name: BOSTON OMAHA Corp
summary: PART I . Our Company Boston Omaha Corporation, which we refer to as the Company, our Company, we, us or our, commenced its current business operations in June 2015 and currently operates four separate lines of business: outdoor billboard advertising, broadband services, surety insurance and related brokerage activities,and an asset management business.
